title: CBB Rulebook Volume 1 OM-2A Cloud Outsourcing Arrangements
summary: Requires conventional bank licensees to manage material cloud outsourcing risk including due diligence, data protection, confidentiality, information security, audit access, data location, business continuity, incident management and regulatory access.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Cloud outsourcing controls for conventional bank licensees.

notes: Related instruments: Related to CBB Appendix OM-2 Cloud Outsourcing Control Guidelines
